path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\01. Splattack!.mp3
description: I don't love the original and I don't think remix elevates it much at all.
title: Splattack!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\02. Splattack!.mp3
description: The Avril Lavigne ass vibe of Splatoon in general is exemplified in this track. Then there are horrible vocals.
title: Splattack!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\03. Ink or Sink.mp3

album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\04. Seaskape.mp3

title: Seaskape
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\05. Kraken Up.mp3
description: God. I struggle so much with this shitty-ass Splatoon music. What is this singing.
title: Kraken Up
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\06. Metalopod.mp3

title: Metalopod
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\07. Split & Splat.mp3
description: It's just this combination of block guitar chords, horrible vocals, too loud drums. Can't stand it.
title: Split & Splat
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\08. Now or Never!.mp3
description: I mean it's cool that ska music is at least represented a bit. But the choice of this lead synth banging on that one note doesn't make for a good listening experience.
title: Now or Never!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\09. Now or Never! - Splatoon.mp3
description: Horrible.
title: Now or Never!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\11. Now or Never! - Splatoon 2.mp3
description: Splatoon wasn't able to rescue this shit track from the gutter.
title: Now or Never!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\15. Now or Never! (Splatfest Version) - Splatoon.mp3
description: There are so many versions of this track, why oh why. Looking at the smash wiki, I realise that Now or Never is for the final moments of a battle on the Splatoon stage.
title: Now or Never! (Splatfest Version)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\17. Now or Never! (Splatfest Version) - Splatoon 2.mp3
description: So many of these and they're all horrible.
title: Now or Never! (Splatfest Version)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\13. Ink Me Up.mp3
description: Making these sea creatures sing garbled, unintelligible pop songs in a Britney Spears way is just ridiculous. It sounds terrible.
title: Ink Me Up
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\19. Octoweaponry.mp3
description: This is horrible. But a different kind of horrible to the other Splatoon songs. This one has these weird telephone beep sounds, and weird vocal samples after that, discordant stabs. It's horrible.
title: Octoweaponry
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\20. I am Octavio.mp3
description: I really dislike this.
title: I am Octavio
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\21. Calamari Inkantation.mp3
description: Widely agreed to be one of the better Splatoon songs and I do agree. I'll give it 2 stars instead of 1.
title: Calamari Inkantation
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\22. Bomb Rush Blush.mp3
description: More horrible anime-ass Jpop style music. It's what I imagine Hatsune Miku does. Not for me.
title: Bomb Rush Blush
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\23. Inkoming!.mp3
description: I think they're going for 'cool' but to me it's just 'cringe'.
title: Inkoming!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\24. Rip Entry.mp3
description: I just really dislike the vocals more than anything.
title: Rip Entry
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\25. Undertow.mp3
description: It would be listenable if it weren't for the vocals. I kinda like the guitar chords.
title: Undertow
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\26. Don't Slip.mp3
description: Shoutouts to Splatoon for doing a 7/8 piece of shit track.
title: Don't Slip
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\28. Endolphin Surge.mp3
description: Don't like the completely dissonant guitar chords and synths. Then horrible Splatoon rapping over it. Miserable.
title: Endolphin Surge
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\29. Ebb & Flow.mp3
description: Some pieces of music don't need to exist. I'm thinking about this video I saw of a packed out stadium in Japan watching this song being performed live by holograms of the Squid Sisters. People must really like it. I guess it's like 'idol'-style music?
title: Ebb & Flow
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\30. Acid Hues.mp3
description: This one isn't as bad as the others. It would benefit from no vocals but it's a fun track.
title: Acid Hues
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 22: Splatoon

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\31. Muck Warfare.mp3
description: I hate it.

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 22 - Splatoon (Switch) (gamerip) (2018)\32. Deluge Dirge.mp3

title: Deluge Dirge
